notes: GoldenMatch 1.19.0 zero-config controller with native Rust kernels (GOLDENMATCH_NATIVE=1). Bit-exact vs pure-Python: composite 92.03 in both modes, identical per-tier F1. Reference (ungated) because the native ext must be built from the goldenmatch repo (not pip-reproducible by CI). DQBench tiers use the polars-direct backend, so block-scoring is not exercised. See docs/validation/2026-05-25-goldenmatch-native-er.md.

Active-learning matcher run with deterministic weak supervision (shared email/phone -> match, random -> distinct; no ground truth). NOT reproducible: dedupe's training/blocking varies run-to-run even with seeded RNGs. Reference only.
